persona.name: Present After Dark
persona.description: Someone whose evenings belong to them again — off the feed, and actually in the room.

milestones.title: Reclaim the last hour
milestones._comment: 20 of 21 — checking this off during the take completes it on camera

action.title: Phone on the charger by 10pm
action.kickstartVersion: Just put it face-down in another room

action.title: Read 10 pages
action.anchorLink: After my phone goes on the charger

action.title: No phone for the first 30 minutes
action.kickstartVersion: Leave it face-down while the coffee brews

_comment_history: missDaysAgo = every action missed that day (red on the calendar — proves 'a missed day never erases you'). partialDaysAgo = only the first scheduled action done (amber). Today is deliberately left unlogged so the demo can complete it on camera.

notes.6: Nearly skipped it — did the short version instead

reflections.userInput: I'm ready for my weekly review.
reflections.aiFeedback: You showed up on four of five days last week — that's the Present After Dark doing exactly what they do. Let's protect what's working.

reflections.userInput: I'm ready for my weekly review.
reflections.aiFeedback: You showed up on four of five days last week — that's the Present After Dark doing exactly what they do. Let's protect what's working.

onboardingAnswers: I want my evenings back. I lose two hours a night to my phone without deciding to.
Realistically the phone needs to be out of the room, or I'll pick it up.
